title: Executable AGENT_CONTRACT.md mirror guard - allowed/forbidden path lists must match agent-roles JSON

evidence.ref: Dep map declares agent-roles artifact mirrored_in=[AGENT_CONTRACT.md] since D001 but no executable check verified the mirror. D021 + D024 absorbed catch-up drift after the fact. D025 docfresh catches the case where a decision-PR forgets the doc update; D034 closes the symmetric case where the doc or JSON is edited independently
025-doc-freshness-guard - same recurring-mirror class; D034 covers the symmetric case docfresh doesn't
031-forbid-ssot-schemas + 032-c016-executable-guard - same SSOT-symmetry pattern, applied to data+schema pairs in forbidden_paths
033-register-ci-tools - third executable cross-check added to ssotdeps cross-check; D034 is the fourth

guards.ref: internal/ssotdeps.VerifyAgentContractMirror - regex over AGENT_CONTRACT.md extracts the code-fenced blocks under '### Allowed paths' and '### Forbidden paths' headings and diffSet against agent-roles dumb-agent role's allowed_paths and forbidden_paths. Wired into ssotdeps cross-check; runs in contracts.yml on every PR
concept-map C-018 - codifies the rule; concept-map bumped v0.21.0 to v0.22.0

examples: Adding ir/domain/** to dumb-agent forbidden_paths in agent-roles.riido.json but not to AGENT_CONTRACT.md: ssotdeps cross-check fires with 'AGENT_CONTRACT.md mirror drift (D034): "ir/domain/**" is in dumb-agent.forbidden_paths but missing from the AGENT_CONTRACT.md ### forbidden_paths code block'.
Symmetric drift (path in MD only): 'is in the AGENT_CONTRACT.md ### forbidden_paths code block but missing from dumb-agent.forbidden_paths'.
Reordering paths in either file: PASSES - comparison is set-based.
counterexamples: Editing prose surrounding the code blocks is unaffected - D034 only diffs the fenced code-block contents.
Other agent-roles fields (max_files_per_pr, pr_isolation, auto_merge_paths) are NOT yet mirror-checked - successor decision can extend if those fields drift.
designer and guard-author roles are not currently mirrored as code blocks in AGENT_CONTRACT.md - rule is dumb-agent-specific.
